content.text: Ticketmaster's official Gillette Stadium schedule lists BTS World Tour 'ARIRANG' in Foxborough on **August 5 and August 6, 2026**

citations.cited_text: According to a press release from Live Nation, the shows will mark the first time a K-pop act has ever performed in the Boston area.
citations.title: BTS is coming to Gillette Stadium for a pair of concerts | Boston.com

citations.cited_text: The 79-show tour will visit 34 regions, including a pair of shows at Gillette Stadium on Wednesday, Aug. 5 and Thursday, Aug. 6 at 8 p.m.
citations.title: BTS is coming to Gillette Stadium for a pair of concerts | Boston.com

content.text: a Live Nation press release cited by Boston.com confirms the pair of shows at Gillette Stadium on **Aug. 5 and Aug. 6**
, directly contradicting the claimed dates of 2026-08-12 and 2026-08-13.
